DisableCfwProtect.instanceId: The ID of the protected instance
DisableCfwProtect.role: Attribute specific to PEERCONN instances; the role of the instance, valid values: \[ acceptor \| initiator \]; required when the instance type is PEERCONN
DisableCfwProtect.memberId: Attribute specific to CSN instances; the network instance ID within the CSN; required when the instance type is CSN
